title: Stacking Context
description: Build an overlapping card layout where cards stack in a specific visual order using z-index and positioning
html:
Back Card
Middle Card
Front Card

hints.text: z-index only works on positioned elements. Higher z-index values appear in front of lower ones.
Make each card position: absolute. Use top/left to offset them. Assign z-index 1/2/3 for back/middle/front.
Position each card absolutely, offset with top/left, and use z-index to control stacking order.
